body_txt: They'll misplace papers, forget calls, get lost on the way to the office, and/or otherwise just fail to be useful. How they got or keep the job makes no logical sense, although it may have something to do with the fact that it's hilarious to watch their mistakes frustrate their office-mates time and time again. Or alternately, they could hold their position by providing eye-candy , either in-universe or for the audience. More often than not, it's a combination of both. This is a subtrope of The Ditz . It can overlap with both Sexy Secretary , and by extension, Brainless Beauty . Contrast Sassy Secretary , who has a tendency to be more intelligent than her bosses, and Girl Friday , who is much more competent, period.
